name: Changes Controlled
description: Changes to baselined configuration items occur only through an approved change-control process.
rationale: DO-178C Table A-8: problem reporting, change control, change review and configuration status accounting govern any modification to baselined data.

examples.fails: the required objective evidence is absent

source: RTCA DO-178C / EUROCAE ED-12C — Software Considerations in Airborne Systems and Equipment Certification; objectives per Annex A tables A-1 to A-10.
